THE CASE IS SEVERED FROM BRAYTON GROUP 385 AND ADDED TO BRAYTON GROUP 407. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/16/07 IS CONTINUED TO 8/13/07 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPT. 206, AND THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATE OF 3/21/07 IS CONTINUED TO 7/11/07 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 318.
